description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Main that triggers on push to all branches and tags matching [0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+, and on pull requests to all branches. The workflow has multiple jobs for building on Windows, macOS, and Linux, and deploying to DockerHub and GitHub Container Registry when a tag is pushed. Each build job uses premake5 and specific toolchains to generate and build project files, and uploads the resulting binaries as artifacts.
